response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with 20 years of experience and direct expertise in the primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React). Current role at re:cinq demonstrates active engagement with the exact responsibilities needed—full-stack development, AI-agent infrastructure, and modern tooling. Primary concern is lack of explicit Nest.js mention, but deep Node.js mastery and consistent pattern of framework adoption across roles suggests rapid capability. Testing mindset and TDD background are valuable assets that align well with the team's quality expectations.
strengths: Direct expertise in core stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React with proven delivery across multiple senior roles and current full-stack position
Strong engineering fundamentals evidenced by TDD adoption, microservices architecture work, and multiple staff-level positions demonstrating architectural thinking
AI-agent infrastructure experience at current role directly matches job requirement; demonstrates continuous learning across diverse tech stacks
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js framework, only general Node.js expertise; would require some ramp-up on framework-specific patterns
Limited evidence of authentication, authorization, and security best-practices implementation in resume despite clear job requirement
Recent focus on diverse tooling and open-source work may indicate depth gaps in enterprise-scale fullstack application patterns

key_factors.factor: Tech stack alignment and experience depth
